- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements

- [x] Scaffold the Project

- [x] Customize the Project

- [x] Install Required Extensions

- [x] Compile the Project

- [x] Create and Run Task

- [ ] Launch the Project

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

Execution Guidelines
- Use available tools to track progress and update after each step.
- Keep explanations concise; state when steps are skipped.
- Use '.' as the working directory; avoid unnecessary media or links.
- Prompt for clarification when requirements are assumed.
- Only install extensions specified by project setup info.
- Tasks are complete when the project builds cleanly, instructions exist, and launch steps are clear.
